channel.title: linux on Blog of Jason Meridth
channel.description: Recent content in linux on Blog of Jason Meridth

item.title: Studying for RHCSA/RHCE Exams
item.description: Update: I had to put this on hold due to a job switch and haven’t studied any further or signed up for an exam again - 1/6/2015

item.title: Not a fan of Ubuntu Unity, trying out Cinnamon desktop environment
item.description: Since I finally switched to Linux as my native OS (Ubuntu 14.

item.title: Getting a Canon MX450 Series Working With Ubuntu 14.04
item.description: Today I needed to scan something on my Canon MX450 series printer from my laptop running Ubuntu 14.

item.title: Restarting Audio in Ubuntu After Issues
item.description: The following command restarted audio for me in Ubuntu after my microphone on my headphones stopped working.

item.title: I Finally Have Linux As My Native OS
item.description: I finally replaced OSX on my Mac with Ubuntu 14.04 LTS.
